---
title: "Linking Input Data"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Linking Input Data}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r}
library(MadagascarWeatherStations)
```

<!-- WARNING - This vignette is generated by {fusen} from dev/flat_link_inputs.Rmd: do not edit by hand -->




# link_inputs

Here we're defining a simple function that symlinks the input data to 
the local data directory. This make sit easy to work with data stored
on the google drive, copied to FASRC.



We'll use this notebook to develop tracking for individual raw data files.
